root.m_Talk_DEU: Whew... Now, what should I do to commemorate this newfound freedom?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whew... Now, what should I do to commemorate this newfound freedom?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Come to think of it, that teacher, Lucid... just treated my story like a novel, didn't she?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Come to think of it, that teacher, Lucid... just treated my story like a novel, didn't she?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Come to think of it, that teacher, Lucid... just treated my story like a novel, didn't she?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll prove to her that I'm the real deal by climbing back to the top of the simulation training!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll prove to her that I'm the real deal by climbing back to the top of the simulation training!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll prove to her that I'm the real deal by climbing back to the top of the simulation training!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Entering simulation. Participants are asked to wait in their seats.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Entering simulation. Participants are asked to wait in their seats.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Entering simulation. Participants are asked to wait in their seats.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Welcome, Miss Naielle Bluesteel.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Welcome, Miss Naielle Bluesteel.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Welcome, Miss Naielle Bluesteel.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Type name. <color=#ffd34c>Counters Legacy</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Type name. <color=#ffd34c>Counters Legacy</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Type name. <color=#ffd34c>Counters Legacy</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Counters Legacy...? What's that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Counters Legacy...? What's that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Counters Legacy...? What's that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Access was denied by the system administrator. Initiating security protocols.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Access was denied by the system administrator. Initiating security protocols.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Access was denied by the system administrator. Initiating security protocols.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The simulation training is currently under maintenance.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The simulation training is currently under maintenance.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The simulation training is currently under maintenance.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Scheduled maintenance end date, <color=#ffd34c>-Undetermined-</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Scheduled maintenance end date, <color=#ffd34c>-Undetermined-</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Scheduled maintenance end date, <color=#ffd34c>-Undetermined-</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? WHAT?! Why is it suddenly under maintenance?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? WHAT?! Why is it suddenly under maintenance?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? WHAT?! Why is it suddenly under maintenance?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Yawn* There are always people like you... People who don't read the notice and make a fuss...
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Yawn* There are always people like you... People who don't read the notice and make a fuss...
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Yawn* There are always people like you... People who don't read the notice and make a fuss...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've been up for four hours, so I'm really cranky...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've been up for four hours, so I'm really cranky...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've been up for four hours, so I'm really cranky...

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's just four hours...
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's just four hours...
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's just four hours...

root.m_Talk_ENG: What's with the maintenance? Is it broken?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What's with the maintenance? Is it broken?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What's with the maintenance? Is it broken?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Chairwoman is planning a complete overhaul of the Academy's simulation training system.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Chairwoman is planning a complete overhaul of the Academy's simulation training system.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Chairwoman is planning a complete overhaul of the Academy's simulation training system.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A new system will be implemented soon, so you better be prepared.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A new system will be implemented soon, so you better be prepared.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A new system will be implemented soon, so you better be prepared.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Pfft! It's going through maintenance all day just because of that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Pfft! It's going through maintenance all day just because of that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Pfft! It's going through maintenance all day just because of that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait. What did you just say?94p
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait. What did you just say?94p
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait. What did you just say?94p

root.m_Talk_ENG: A new system is being implemented?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: A new system is being implemented?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: A new system is being implemented?!
